The company is considered 38.6% undervalued by some analyses, with a fair value of $8.35 based on future cash flows and anticipated improvements from operational streamlining and workforce reduction. However, its current P/S ratio of 8x, while cheaper than the industry average, is still above a fair ratio of 4.5x, suggesting potential valuation risk if growth expectations are not met.

title: NVAX: Pivot to platform partnerships and innovation drives growth, with profitability targeted by 2028
summary: Novavax (NVAX) is pursuing a strategy focused on platform partnerships and innovation, aiming for profitability by 2028. The company has secured significant deals with Sanofi and Pfizer, leveraging its Matrix-M technology, and is advancing its R&D pipeline in vaccines and immunotherapies. This approach is supported by financial discipline and a strong intellectual property position.

title: Form 424B5 ROCKET PHARMACEUTICALS,
summary: Rocket Pharmaceuticals has filed a Form 424B5 prospectus supplement to offer up to $100,000,000 of common stock through Cantor Fitzgerald & Co. as its sales agent in an "at the market offering." The company plans to use the net proceeds primarily for general corporate purposes and working capital. This offering follows the termination of a prior sales agreement and a strategic corporate reorganization announced in July 2025 focusing on its AAV cardiovascular gene therapy platform.

title: Real estate platform Fathom sets Mar. 30 call on 2025 results
summary: Fathom Holdings (Nasdaq: FTHM) announced it will host a conference call on Monday, March 30, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. The company will issue a press release with financial results prior to the call. Investors can access the call via a live audio webcast or dial-in numbers, with a replay available until April 13, 2026.

title: Arcus Biosciences (RCUS) Valuation After Casdatifan Kidney Cancer Data Pipeline Update And Earnings
summary: Arcus Biosciences (RCUS) has seen renewed investor interest following updated clinical data for its kidney cancer drug, casdatifan, a broader pipeline update, and its full-year 2025 earnings. Despite recent short-term share price dips, the stock shows strong long-term momentum with a 134.96% return over the past year. Analysts assess RCUS as undervalued, with an intrinsic value estimate pointing to a significant discount and a fair value of $32.30.

title: Galapagos Receives Transparency Notifications from Bank of America
summary: Galapagos NV received transparency notifications from Bank of America Corporation regarding its holdings of Galapagos' voting rights. Bank of America initially fell below the 5% threshold on March 3, 2026, due to the disposal of financial instruments. However, a subsequent notification indicated that Bank of America crossed back above the 5% threshold on March 4, 2026, after acquiring similar instruments. As of March 6, 2026, Bank of America Corporation held 5.80% of Galapagos' outstanding shares, combining direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments.

title: Infinity Natural Resources Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results and Provides 2026 Outlook
summary: Infinity Natural Resources reported significant growth in its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial and operating results, including a transformational acquisition of assets from Antero Resources and Antero Midstream. The company achieved 93% growth in total net daily production in Q4 2025 and 46% for the full year, along with substantial increases in net income and Adjusted EBITDAX. Infinity also provided a strong 2026 outlook, projecting capital expenditures of $450-500 million and a 70% year-over-year growth in total net daily production.

title: Natures Sunshine 2025 Earnings: $19.5M Profit, 2026 Revenue Forecast - News and Statistics
summary: Natures Sunshine Products Inc. reported full-year 2025 net income of $19.5 million ($1.06 per share) on $480.1 million in revenue, following a Q4 profit of $4.1 million (23 cents per share) and $123.8 million in revenue. The company forecasts its 2026 full-year revenue to be between $500 million and $515 million. This financial update is accompanied by a detailed report on the protein concentrate and flavored sugar syrup industry in the United States, which includes market trends, forecasts to 2035, and pricing analysis.

title: Nature's Sunshine Products (NASDAQ:NATR) Issues Earnings Results
summary: Nature's Sunshine Products (NASDAQ: NATR) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting an EPS of $0.30, surpassing the consensus of $0.19, and revenue of $123.81 million, exceeding estimates of $121.62 million. Following the report, shares traded slightly down at $25.08, with a market capitalization of $438.9 million and a P/E ratio of 30.96. Insider transactions included EVP Bryant J. Yates selling 1,700 shares, while institutional investors hold a significant 79.4% of the stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a $26 price target.

title: Kroger (KR) Stock Gets Price Target Boost from Evercore; the Company Projects 1%-2% Comparable Sales Growth for 2026
summary: Evercore ISI analyst Michael Montani raised the price target for The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) to $83 from $81, reiterating an Outperform rating. Kroger's new CEO, Greg Foran, plans to expand market share by focusing on affordable fresh food and responsive delivery, funding these initiatives through cost savings. Foran expects 2026 identical sales (excluding fuel) to grow 1%-2% and adjusted earnings per share between $5.10 and $5.30.

title: Kroger (KR) Stock Gets Price Target Boost from Evercore; the Company Projects 1%–2% Comparable Sales Growth for 2026
summary: Evercore ISI analyst Michael Montani raised the price target for Kroger (KR) stock to $83 from $81, reiterating an Outperform rating. Kroger's new CEO, Greg Foran, plans to focus on affordable fresh food and responsive delivery to expand market share, leading to a 2% stock increase in early trading. The company projects 1%-2% comparable sales growth excluding fuel for 2026 and adjusted earnings per share between $5.10 and $5.30.

title: Identiv Inc expected to post a loss of 17 cents a share - Earnings Preview
summary: Identiv Inc (INVE) is projected to report a loss of 17 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv earnings preview. The full article is a brief statement regarding these expectations.

title: OMS Energy Technologies (NASDAQ: OMSE) CEO How Meng Hock to Showcase Record Cash Position and Global Growth Strategy at 38th Annual ROTH Conference
summary: OMS Energy Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: OMSE) CEO How Meng Hock will present the company's strong cash position, global growth strategy, and operational milestones at the 38th Annual ROTH Conference from March 22-24, 2026. The company, a manufacturer of surface wellhead systems and oil country tubular goods, boasts a robust $128.7 million cash position and operates 11 manufacturing facilities in six countries. Mr. Hock will discuss OMS's expanding customer base and its strategic initiatives, including a long-standing supply contract with Saudi Aramco.

title: $128.7M cash, zero debt: inside OMS Energy’s global oilfield push
summary: OMS Energy Technologies CEO How Meng Hock will present the company's strong financial position, including $128.7 million in cash and zero debt, at the 38th Annual ROTH Conference. He will highlight OMS's 11 manufacturing facilities across six countries, its long-standing contract with Saudi Aramco, and its strategy for global expansion to meet the accelerating demand for oilfield equipment. The company aims to showcase its localized manufacturing and integrated supply chain advantages to institutional investors.

title: 3 Reasons to Steer Clear of GLDD and One Alternative Stock Worth Buying
summary: Despite a recent 41.2% stock price surge for Great Lakes Dredge & Dock (GLDD), the article advises investors to be cautious. It highlights three main concerns: tepid backlog growth, slim gross margins indicating profitability challenges, and persistent cash burn. The article suggests that while the stock's current valuation appears fair, the underlying business risks are significant, and investors should consider alternative growth stocks.

title: Nexeon Medsystems and QT Imaging Compared in Financial Survey
summary: A financial survey analyzed Nexeon Medsystems and QT Imaging, two medical device companies, to compare their financial health and investment potential. The analysis revealed Nexeon Medsystems has higher earnings and volatility, but lower revenue than QT Imaging, coupled with stronger insider ownership and more bullish analyst ratings. This comparison aims to provide investors with insights into the strengths and weaknesses of these medical technology firms for informed decision-making.

title: The Next Big Commodity Trade Of 2026 Is Growing In A Field Near You
summary: After a strong performance in precious metals and a recent breakout in energy commodities, experts suggest that agricultural commodities, particularly grains like corn, wheat, and soybeans, could be the next significant trade. This potential surge is linked to rising energy prices impacting fertilizer costs and production, geopolitical tensions in the Gulf region affecting fertilizer supply, and hints of strength seen in global food prices, especially vegetable oils. Exchange-traded funds like the VanEck Agribusiness ETF (MOO) and the Invesco DB Agriculture Fund (DBA) offer ways for investors to gain exposure to this sector.

title: Bitcoin Fear & Greed Index at Cycle Lows, Price Holding Firm
summary: This article discusses how Bitcoin's price has stabilized despite its Fear & Greed Index reaching a cycle low of 10 on March 8, the lowest since mid-2022. The author notes that low investor sentiment, as indicated by the index, might present a compelling risk/reward opportunity for long-term investors in digital assets. Bitcoin's 30-day realized volatility also increased significantly by March 4, 2026.

title: JP Morgan Lowers Kohl's (KSS) Price Target to $15.00 | KSS Stock News
summary: JP Morgan analyst Matthew Boss has lowered the price target for Kohl's (KSS) from $22.00 to $15.00, while maintaining an "Underweight" rating. This adjustment, a 31.82% decrease, reflects a cautious outlook on the stock, though other analysts have issued varying ratings and price targets. Kohl's, which operates approximately 1,150 department stores, currently has an average target price of $21.27 from 12 analysts, implying a potential 45.87% upside from its current price of $14.58.

title: Kohl’s leans further into digital sales, Q4 revenue drops
summary: Kohl's is focusing on digital transformation and enhancing its online capabilities despite a drop in overall Q4 and full-year 2025 revenue. Digital sales grew in low single digits and accounted for 35% of total Q4 sales, but lower conversion rates offset increased traffic. The retailer aims to modernize its ecommerce infrastructure for better personalization, search, and omnichannel integration, leveraging AI and agent technology for future growth.

title: Jana Partners sells Mercury Systems (MRCY) shares worth $41.4 million
summary: Jana Partners Management, LP, a director at Mercury Systems INC (NASDAQ:MRCY), sold 452,057 shares of common stock for approximately $41.4 million between March 2 and March 4, 2026. This sale, intended for rebalancing, follows a 110% return for Mercury Systems over the past year and occurred after the company reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for revenue and EPS.

title: Omega Flex Reports Lower Sales and Net Income for 2025
summary: Omega Flex, Inc. reported a decline in net sales and net income for 2025. Net sales were $98,296,000, down 3.3% from 2024, attributed to lower unit volumes and a suppressed market with fewer housing starts. Net income also decreased by 17.7% to $14,827,000, due to lower sales and increased spending on product development and certification.

title: KB HOME TO RELEASE 2026 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS ON MARCH 24, 2026
summary: KB Home announced that it will release its first-quarter earnings for the period ended February 28, 2026, after market close on Tuesday, March 24, 2026. A live webcast of the earnings conference call will be held the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time, accessible via the Investor Relations section of the KB Home website. The webcast will be available for replay for 30 days.

title: Liquidity Services (NASDAQ:LQDT) SVP Sells $159,291.69 in Stock
summary: Steven Weiskircher, SVP of Liquidity Services (NASDAQ:LQDT), sold 4,967 shares of the company's stock for $159,291.69, reducing his stake by 7.05%. The sale occurred after the company reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and provided optimistic Q2 2026 guidance. Liquidity Services' stock is currently trading around $32.24, with institutional investors holding a significant portion, and analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating with an average target price of $44.00.

title: Enterprise Products Partners (NYSE:EPD) Given New $39.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Enterprise Products Partners (EPD) to $39.00 from $35.00, reiterating a "neutral" rating and implying a 6.2% upside. Analyst consensus for EPD is mixed, with an average rating of "Hold" and a target of $36.57. Enterprise Products Partners recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.75, beating estimates, and has a market cap of approximately $79.4 billion.

title: Lotus Tech Launches Pre-Sales for LOTUS For Me in China
summary: Lotus Technology Inc. has commenced pre-sales for its new hyper-SUV, LOTUS For Me, in China, with prices starting from Rmb528,000. This new model will feature advanced smart driving architecture, an NVIDIA Thor chip for autonomous functionalities, and comes with high-end specifications including a powerful hybrid powertrain and luxury amenities. The company emphasizes a balance of responsibility and performance, aiming to appeal to family-oriented individuals who still seek an exciting driving experience.

title: Lotus' 3.3-second family hyper-SUV opens for pre-sale from $76,800
summary: Lotus Technology has launched pre-sales in China for its LOTUS For Me hyper-SUV, with prices starting from Rmb528,000 (approximately $76,800 USD). The vehicle boasts impressive specifications, including 0-100 km/h acceleration in 3.3 seconds, a combined cruising range over 1,400 km, and standard advanced features like NVIDIA Thor compute and a 23-speaker KEF audio system. Deliveries are expected to begin by the end of March 2026.

title: Franco Nevada Brief: US$597.3 Million in Q4 Revenue, A "New Record", +86%
summary: Franco-Nevada Corporation reported a "new record" of US$597.3 million in Q4 revenue, marking an 86% increase year-over-year. This strong performance contributed to a "record-breaking year" for the company. The company also achieved the top end of its revised 2025 GEO guidance range due to a robust fourth quarter.

title: A Look At PureCycle Technologies (PCT) Valuation After Its Latest 10 K Going Concern Warning
summary: PureCycle Technologies (PCT) recently filed its latest 10-K, receiving an unqualified opinion from Grant Thornton, but also a going concern warning. Despite the company's financial instability and recent share price decline, Simply Wall St suggests a fair value of $15.17 for PCT, significantly higher than its current trading price, based on assumptions of rapid scaling and improving unit economics. However, the company's high P/B ratio compared to the industry average indicates high market expectations, posing potential valuation risks if execution falters.

title: Hallador Energy Company Closes $120 Million Senior Secured Credit Agreement to Enhance Liquidity and Support Growth Initiatives
summary: Hallador Energy Company has secured a new $120 million Senior Secured Credit Agreement, consisting of a $75 million revolving credit facility and a $45 million delayed draw term loan. This agreement aims to refinance existing debt, provide working capital, enhance liquidity, and extend the debt maturity profile to March 5, 2029. Texas Capital Bank arranged the transaction, with Old National Bank and First Financial Bank also participating.

title: Dayton advances Graco global headquarters plans
summary: Dayton has recommended approval for Graco's new 96,000-square-foot global headquarters, which will be built on a 27.6-acre site overlooking French Lake. This three-story building will support approximately 200 employees and replace Graco's current headquarters in northeast Minneapolis. The project is expected to begin construction in summer 2026 and be completed in 2027, despite some concerns raised about its height within the Shoreline Conservation District.

title: BMO Bank goes on Bay Area branch-building binge
summary: BMO Bank is embarking on an ambitious branch expansion strategy in the Bay Area, following its acquisition of Bank of the West. While specific details remain under wraps, the plan involves opening five new branches in the region. This move signifies a significant investment by BMO Bank to strengthen its presence in the Bay Area market.

title: UBS Analyst Lowers Price Target for FIZZ, Maintains 'Sell' Ratin
summary: UBS analyst Peter Grom has reiterated a 'Sell' rating for National Beverage (FIZZ) and lowered the price target from $35.00 to $34.00, marking a 2.86% decrease. This decision aligns with UBS's consistent cautious outlook on the company, evidenced by several previous price target reductions and 'Sell' ratings. Despite this, the average analyst target implies a slight downside, while GuruFocus estimates a significant upside based on its GF Value calculation.

title: Flexsteel Industries Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.20 per Share; Payable April 9 to Shareholders of Record March 30
summary: Flexsteel Industries announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.20 per share. The dividend is payable on April 9 to shareholders of record as of March 30. This information was published on March 10, 2026.

title: MKS Instruments Stock Hits Day Low Amid Price Pressure, Reaches $209.08
summary: MKS Instruments, Inc. experienced a stock decline, reaching an intraday low of $209.08, despite an impressive 31.41% year-to-date increase and strong annual returns of 154.48%. The company maintains a solid financial position with low debt, strong interest coverage, consistent net sales, and profit growth, supported by high institutional holdings. This suggests resilience despite recent price pressure.

title: Limoneira Co expected to post a loss of 33 cents a share - Earnings Preview
summary: Limoneira Co (LMNR) is expected to announce an earnings loss of 33 cents per share. This financial forecast is based on an earnings preview, indicating a challenging period ahead for the company. The report cites Refinitiv as the source of this information.

title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust schedules Q1 2026 results release and conference call
summary: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (PEB) has announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 28, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for April 29, 2026, at 9:00 AM ET. A live webcast and archived replay will be available on the company's Investor Relations website.

title: Gap Inc. And Arvind Limited Unveil New Treatment Facility to Address Water Waste in Apparel Manufacturing
summary: Gap Inc. and Arvind Limited have opened a new water treatment facility at Arvind's denim manufacturing plant in Ahmedabad, India, to eliminate freshwater use and save 8 million liters of fresh water daily. This initiative is a significant step towards reducing water waste in apparel production, utilizing Membrane Bio Reactor (MBR) technology to treat domestic wastewater. The project contributes to Gap Inc.'s goal of reducing 10 billion liters of water in its supply chain by 2020 and supports Arvind Limited's aim to use 100% recycled water in textile production by the end of 2020.

title: Insider Buying: Eastern (NASDAQ:EML) Director Purchases 5,067 Shares of Stock
summary: Eastern (NASDAQ:EML) director James Mitarotonda recently purchased 5,067 shares of the company's stock for approximately $92,675, increasing his total ownership to 640,000 shares. This insider buying follows a Q4 earnings miss and amidst weaker truck and automotive markets affecting revenue. Despite these challenges, the company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.11, and institutional investors hold about 77% of its shares.

title: Eastern (NASDAQ:EML) Director Acquires $43,889.08 in Stock
summary: An Eastern Company director, James Mitarotonda, purchased 2,342 shares for $43,889.08, increasing his stake by 0.37%. This insider activity comes as the company reported a Q4 EPS miss, though it continues to pay a quarterly dividend and maintains strong institutional support. Various market factors and recent acquisitions are also impacting the company's sentiment.

title: ICL Group Names SolarEdge Executive Asaf Alperovitz as New CFO Amid Planned Retirement
summary: ICL Group has announced that its long-serving CFO, Aviram Lahav, will retire on June 15, 2026. Asaf Alperovitz, currently CFO of SolarEdge Technologies, has been appointed as the new CFO, effective the same date. This leadership change aims to strengthen ICL's executive team and support its growth strategy.

title: Japan Smaller Capitalization Fund, Inc. Announces Monthly Distributions for April, May and June 2026 Under Its Level Distribution Plan
summary: Japan Smaller Capitalization Fund, Inc. (JOF) declared monthly cash distributions of $0.0887 per share for April, May, and June 2026, consistent with its Level Distribution Plan. This plan aims to provide a constant monthly distribution, sourced from net investment income, realized capital gains, and/or return of shareholder capital. The Fund specializes in Japanese smaller capitalization companies, focusing on long-term capital appreciation and stable distributions.

title: Japan Smaller Capitalization Fund, Inc. Announces Monthly Cash Distributions to Shareholders
summary: Japan Smaller Capitalization Fund, Inc. (JOF) announced monthly cash distributions of $0.0887 per share for April, May, and June 2026 under its Level Distribution Plan. The plan aims to provide shareholders with a stable, though not guaranteed, fixed rate of distribution, funded by net investment income, realized capital gains, or return of shareholder capital. The Fund, managed by Nomura Asset Management U.S.A., focuses on long-term capital appreciation from smaller capitalization companies in Japan and is committed to delivering long-term value to its shareholders.

title: Raymond James reiterates Legend Biotech stock rating on strong Q4 results
summary: Raymond James reiterated an Outperform rating and $86.00 price target on Legend Biotech Corp. (NASDAQ:LEGN) after the company reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results. The company exceeded revenue and EPS estimates, driven by higher license revenues and lower R&D spending, with its Carvykti product showing significant sales growth. Analysts maintain a positive outlook for Legend Biotech, citing the potential of Carvykti and the company's strong cash position, which is expected to lead to profitability in 2026.

title: Granite Earns Handshake Early Talent Award for Sixth Consecutive Year
summary: Granite (NYSE:GVA) has received the Handshake Early Talent Award for the sixth consecutive year, recognizing its commitment to attracting, developing, and retaining early career talent. This award highlights Granite's dedication to providing meaningful career opportunities, inclusive hiring practices, and long-term professional development for students and recent graduates. The company's focus on early career pathways is a key component of its long-term workforce strategy and reinforces its position as a top employer in the infrastructure and construction industry.

title: loanDepot Inc. (NYSE:LDI) Reports Q4 2025 Revenue Miss and Wider Loss, Stock Falls
summary: loanDepot Inc. (NYSE:LDI) reported a mixed financial performance for Q4 2025, missing revenue and EPS estimates despite operational progress. The company's revenue of $310.3 million fell short of the $337.3 million consensus, and it posted a wider diluted loss per share of $(0.10) compared to an estimated $(0.04). Despite these misses, loanDepot saw increased loan origination volume and an improved organic refinance consumer direct recapture rate, but the negative financial headlines led to a stock decline in after-hours trading.

title: Financial Institutions Announces Planned Retirement of Longtime Director
summary: Financial Institutions, Inc. (FISI) announced that director Donald K. Boswell will retire from the boards of the company and Five Star Bank after nine years, effective after the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. His decision is based on pursuing outside interests and is not due to disagreements with management or policies, indicating a routine transition. The stock currently holds a Buy rating from analysts with a $34.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates FISI as Neutral due to its uneven financial profile and attractive valuation offset by weak near-term technicals.

title: 3 Reasons to Sell WST and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: This article recommends selling West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) due to disappointing long-term revenue growth, a shrinking adjusted operating margin, and declining return on invested capital. The author suggests investing instead in a top digital advertising platform capitalizing on the creator economy, proposing WST's current valuation at 30.7x forward P/E is too high given its underperformance.

title: Liberty Global to Present at NewStreet Research and BCG Global Connectivity Leaders Conference on March 24, 2026
summary: Liberty Global Ltd. (NASDAQ: LBTYA, LBTYB, LBTYK) will present at the NewStreet Research and BCG Global Connectivity Leaders Conference on March 24, 2026, at 11:00 am EDT. The company will discuss its historical operating performance and outlook, highlighting its diversified platforms: Liberty Telecom, Liberty Growth, and Liberty Services. This presentation will be webcast live and archived on Liberty Global's website for approximately 90 days.

title: Liberty Global webcast from NewStreet, BCG event on Mar. 24
summary: Liberty Global (NASDAQ: LBTYA) announced it will present at the NewStreet Research and BCG Global Connectivity Leaders Conference on March 24, 2026, at 11:00 am EDT. The presentation will be webcast live on its website and archived for approximately 90 days. The company may discuss historical operating performance and outlook during its presentation, following recent strategic moves and earnings announcements.

title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Visa Stock In The Last 15 Years
summary: Visa (NYSE: V) has significantly outperformed the market over the last 15 years, achieving an average annual return of 21.14%. An initial investment of $100 in Visa stock 15 years ago would now be worth $1,758.81. This demonstrates the powerful impact of compounded returns on investment growth over time.

title: U.S. Bancorp Announces Quarterly Dividends
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) has declared regular quarterly dividends for its common stock and several series of preferred stock. A quarterly dividend of $0.52 per common share will be paid on April 15, 2026, to stockholders of record on March 31, 2026. Dividends for various preferred stock series, including Series A, B, J, K, L, M, N, and O, were also announced with the same payment and record dates.

title: Old Dominion Expands Billings Service Center
summary: Old Dominion Freight Line Inc. has expanded its presence in Billings, Montana, by moving to a larger 62-door facility. This new service center, more than double the size of the previous one, will help the company manage its growing customer base in the region. Billings is a key location due to its proximity to major interstate highways, serving several cities in Montana and Wyoming.

title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Sempra - SRE
summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Sempra (NYSE: SRE) on behalf of investors. The investigation follows Sempra's reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results, which missed consensus revenue estimates and saw a lowered 2026 earnings guidance. The news led to a significant drop in Sempra's stock price.

title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Filed; April 20, 2026, Lead Plaintiff Deadline
summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made misleading statements about its revenue outlook and growth, particularly regarding its Branded Checkout offerings, which were deemed unrealistic. Investors who suffered losses have until April 20, 2026, to file for lead plaintiff status following a significant stock drop after a surprise CEO change and missed earnings in February 2026.

title: Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Given New $182.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $182.00 from $168.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target implies a potential downside of 6.68% from the stock's current trading price. The analyst consensus for ODFL is currently a "Hold" with an average price target of $191.08, based on various analyst reports.

title: Royal Caribbean Opens 2028 Galapagos Cruises as Celebrity Bets on Premium Demand
summary: Royal Caribbean Group has opened bookings for over 50 Celebrity Cruises Galapagos trips in 2028, focusing on premium, destination-driven offerings aboard the 100-guest Celebrity Flora. This move follows strong advance bookings for 2026 and aligns with the company's strategy to expand its upscale market presence, including Celebrity River Cruises. Despite the positive outlook for premium segments, Royal Caribbean's stock saw a slight dip, and an analyst noted that overall cruise demand wasn't as strong as expected prior to recent geopolitical events.

title: P&G To Invest Nearly $1B In Gillette's South Boston HQ
summary: Procter & Gamble plans to invest nearly $1 billion to develop a new global headquarters and innovation center for Gillette in South Boston. The project involves purchasing 232 A Street, a site previously acquired by Tishman Speyer and Breakthrough Properties for a lab project, which fell through. This investment signifies P&G's commitment to maintaining Gillette's presence in Boston, building on its 125-year history in the area, and is part of a broader long-term strategy for its Massachusetts operations.

title: Pro-gambling interests fail to gain ground in Texas primaries as legislative roadblocks remain
summary: Despite significant investment from Las Vegas Sands, pro-gambling candidates faced setbacks in the recent Texas primaries, failing to defeat a slate of anti-gambling incumbents. Powerful opposition, particularly from Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick, continues to stall legislation, but gambling interests remain committed to a long-term strategy of supporting sympathetic candidates. Public polling indicates support for legalized gambling among Texans, suggesting the industry will continue its efforts despite current legislative roadblocks.

title: Leidos Holdings Inc (LDOS) Shares Down 3.21% on Mar 10
summary: Leidos Holdings Inc (LDOS) shares dropped 3.21% on March 10, trading at $173.77 after reaching an intraday low of $170.03. Despite the dip, analysts forecast an average target price of $211.95, implying a 21.97% upside from its current price, with a consensus "Outperform" rating from 16 brokerage firms. GuruFocus, however, estimates a GF Value of $165.22, suggesting a slight downside.

title: Does KeyCorp’s (KEY) CIO Exit Recast Its Strategy On Community Banking Versus Private Credit Exposure?
summary: KeyCorp's Chief Information Officer Amy G. Brady resigned for personal health reasons, raising questions about the company's strategic focus amidst concerns over private credit exposure in the regional banking sector. While KeyCorp continues to strengthen community banking relationships, investors are scrutinizing its credit risk, with the market's reaction to private credit concerns impacting its stock performance. The article explores KeyCorp's investment narrative, including revenue and earnings forecasts, and highlights that credit perception remains a key factor for the stock's future.

title: KLA Corporation stock rises as Barclays lifts chip-equipment outlook ahead of investor day
summary: KLA Corporation's stock rose after Barclays significantly increased its forecast for chipmaking equipment spending, citing strong demand from AI data centers. This positive outlook comes just before KLA's investor day, where the company is expected to present updated targets and plans. Analysts anticipate new advanced packaging products and focus on KLA's process-control intensity and market-share gains at the event.

title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Macerich (NYSE:MAC) Stock
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. recently raised its price target for Macerich (NYSE:MAC) stock from $18 to $19, although it maintained an "underweight" rating, suggesting a slight downside from the current price. Despite this, other analysts have taken a more positive stance, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $20.46. Macerich posted an earnings miss and a year-over-year revenue decline, though institutional investors have shown varied activity with notable increases in holdings by some firms.

title: How Investors May Respond To Incyte (INCY) Winning EU Approval For Zynyz Combo In Anal Cancer
summary: Incyte (INCY) recently received European Commission approval for Zynyz (retifanlimab) in combination with chemotherapy for the first-line treatment of metastatic or inoperable locally recurrent squamous cell carcinoma of the anal canal. This approval, based on positive Phase 3 data, strengthens Incyte's immuno-oncology portfolio though risks remain regarding generic pressure on its drug Jakafi and broader pipeline execution. Analysts project significant revenue and earnings growth for Incyte by 2028, with some estimating a fair value of $100.10 for the stock.

title: Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
summary: This Form 424B2 filing by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details the offering of $16,980,000 Autocallable Buffered Basket-Linked Notes due 2028, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. The notes' performance is linked to an equally weighted basket of six common stocks, maturing on March 9, 2028, unless automatically called on March 19, 2027, if the basket reaches or exceeds its initial level. The document outlines the terms, hypothetical payment scenarios, anti-dilution adjustments, and significant risk factors including credit risk, limited anti-dilution protection, and conflicts of interest.

title: HPE warns of rising server and storage prices
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is projecting increased server and storage prices due to significant commodity shortages, particularly in DRAM and NAND, which they expect to persist into 2027. Despite a surge in networking revenue driven by AI adoption, HPE's server revenue saw a slight decline in Q1 2026. The company is actively working to secure supply and adjust pricing to mitigate these rising costs, with a substantial AI systems backlog indicating future growth in this sector.

title: Williams Sonoma Announces Expansion of Collaboration with AERIN
summary: Williams Sonoma and Williams Sonoma Home have announced an expanded collaboration with AERIN, the lifestyle brand founded by Aerin Lauder. The new collection, inspired by Lauder's East Hampton garden, features tabletop, decor, entertaining, and furniture items that blend timeless design with modern functionality. Lauder expressed her excitement about translating natural textures and floral motifs into the collection, drawing inspiration from her Long Island summers and her mother's collecting habits.

title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of First Solar, Inc. - FSLR
summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) following a significant drop in its stock price. This investigation stems from the company's Q4 2025 earnings announcement, which missed expectations, and lower-than-anticipated FY 2026 revenue guidance due to "customer headwinds" under the Trump administration. The stock fell over 13% after the announcement, prompting a downgrade from Baird Research.

title: Diamondback Energy Announces Launch of Secondary Common Stock Offering
summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. has announced the launch of a secondary underwritten public offering of 11,000,000 shares of its common stock by SGF FANG Holdings, LP. Diamondback will not receive any proceeds from this sale, and the selling stockholder has granted underwriters an option for an additional 1,650,000 shares. Evercore ISI, Citigroup, and J.P. Morgan are serving as joint book-running managers for the offering.

title: FIS to Present at Upcoming Conference
summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS), a financial technology leader, will present at two upcoming conferences: Wells Fargo’s Annual Payments & Fintech Symposium on March 18, 2026, and the Wolfe Research FinTech Forum on March 10, 2026. Live audio webcasts and replays will be available on the Investor Relations section of FIS’ homepage. The company, headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, is a Fortune 500® member and part of the Standard & Poor’s 500® Index.

title: Investigation announced for Long-Term Investors in shares of DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM)
summary: An investigation has been launched on behalf of long-term investors in DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM) due to alleged breaches of fiduciary duties by the company's directors and officers. This follows a lawsuit concerning securities law violations related to manufacturing process issues with DexCom's G6 and G7 systems, unauthorized modifications, and an FDA warning letter. These issues reportedly led to accuracy problems, health risks, and a significant drop in the company's stock price.

title: Dover to Present at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Dover Corporation announced that its President and CEO, Richard J. Tobin, will speak at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 17, 2026, at 9:30 am ET. A live audio webcast and its replay will be available on the company's website. Dover is a global manufacturer with over $8 billion in annual revenue, operating through five segments.

title: UPDATE 2-Hewlett Packard Enterprise forecasts revenue above estimates on AI boom
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has projected second-quarter revenue that surpasses Wall Street's expectations, driven by the increasing demand for its AI-powered servers featuring Nvidia chips. The company's shares saw a 3.2% increase in extended trading following this announcement. HPE's CEO, Antonio Neri, highlighted strong demand across all segments, and the company also raised its fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS forecast.

title: Western Michigan University to purchase recently-vacated Newell Brands building
summary: Western Michigan University has announced the purchase of the former Newell Rubbermaid building on its Parkview Campus for $6 million. The 62,000 square-foot building will house WMU's facilities operations, management, custodial services, and maintenance, replacing the 105-year-old Physical Plant building which had significant deferred maintenance. This move aims to improve efficiency, avoid costly repairs on aging facilities, and potentially open up new campus development opportunities.

title: Exclusive-Chevron, Shell closing in on first big oil production deals in Venezuela since US captured Maduro, sources say By Reuters
summary: Chevron and Shell are reportedly close to securing major oil production deals in Venezuela, marking the first such agreements since the U.S. captured Nicolas Maduro. These deals would significantly expand the companies' operations in the country's rich oil regions, contributing to what the U.S. aims to be a substantial rebuilding effort for Venezuela's oil industry. Both companies are engaging with Venezuela's state-owned PDVSA, with Chevron focusing on the Orinoco Belt and Shell on developing fields in the Monagas North region.

title: Why Is Centene Stock Falling On Tuesday?
summary: Centene Corp (NYSE:CNC) stock is down today due to warnings of lower membership in Affordable Care Act (ACA) plans and higher utilization patterns in specialty pharmacy. Despite reaffirming its 2026 earnings guidance, the health insurer expects ACA membership attrition to be significant, particularly in higher metal tiers, and reported a decline in total membership across its portfolio in 2025.

title: Cencora at Leerink Conference: Strategic Moves and Growth Plans
summary: Cencora presented at the Leerink Global Healthcare Conference 2026, highlighting strong growth in its U.S. segment and increased consolidated guidance. The company emphasized its MSO strategy, including the acquisition of OneOncology and synergies with Retina Consultants of America, as key drivers for long-term growth in specialty markets. Cencora also discussed managing the impact of the Inflation Reduction Act through effective contracting and its M&A strategy focused on bolt-on acquisitions and pharmaceutical-centric businesses.

title: CMS Energy Links Earnings Upgrade To 20 Year Renewable Growth Plan
summary: CMS Energy reported strong Q4 2025 results, raised its 2026 EPS guidance, and unveiled a 20-year plan focused on expanding solar and wind capacity. This move aligns earnings growth with regulated capital projects in renewables and grid investments. Key risks include reliance on debt for funding and insider selling, while opportunities lie in sustained earnings growth and a larger, renewables-weighted business.

title: West Virginia Public Service Commission Authorizes New Rates for West Virginia American Water
summary: The West Virginia Public Service Commission has approved new rates for West Virginia American Water, resulting in a total annualized revenue increase of $20.5 million. This adjustment supports over $239 million in infrastructure investments made since the company's last rate change in 2024. The new rates, effective March 1, 2026, will lead to an average monthly bill increase for residential water and wastewater customers, while also introducing an additional discount program for eligible customers.

title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for BridgeBio Pharma (NASDAQ:BBIO) Stock
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for BridgeBio Pharma (NASDAQ:BBIO) to $94 from $89, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 26.48% upside. Despite missing EPS estimates, BridgeBio significantly beat revenue expectations, showing a 2521% year-over-year increase. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus, although company insiders sold a substantial number of shares recently.

title: Raymond James reiterates Legend Biotech stock rating on strong Q4 results
summary: Raymond James has reiterated an Outperform rating and an $86.00 price target for Legend Biotech Corp. following the company's strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results. The company reported total revenues of approximately $306 million for Q4 2025, exceeding estimates, and adjusted earnings per share were better than projected due to higher license revenues and lower R&D spending. Analysts maintain a positive outlook on Carvykti's potential, despite competitive challenges, and project the company to reach profitability in 2026.

title: Insider Selling: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) SVP Sells 8,500 Shares of Stock
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) SVP Kelly Brunetti Rose sold 8,500 shares of the company's stock for over $1 million on March 9th, reducing her stake by over 20%. This transaction, along with a separate sale by Director Timothy Leach, coincided with the company reporting an earnings and revenue miss which caused the stock to trade down. Despite this, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target near current levels.

title: Leonardo DRS Adds Reuben Jeffery III to Board
summary: Leonardo DRS has appointed Reuben Jeffery III to its board of directors, effective April 1, 2026, succeeding David W. Carey. This addition is expected to bring extensive experience in global finance and public policy to support the company's growth strategy. Additionally, US Holding extended the term of Dr. Louis Brothers as a Class C proxy holder director until March 31, 2029, ensuring continuity on the board.

title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) Price Target Lowered to $57.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) from $63.00 to $57.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the company beating Q1 EPS estimates. The real estate investment trust's revenue was down year-over-year, and it reported negative net margin and return on equity. Despite these financial metrics, the board authorized a $500 million share buyback, and insiders have been purchasing shares.

title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On March 10th, 348.75K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.49 Million Open Interest
summary: On March 10th, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) saw significant options trading, with a total volume of 348.75K contracts. Call options accounted for 54.39% of transactions, while put options made up 45.61%. The open interest for TQQQ reached approximately 1.49 million contracts, representing 102.93% of the average over the past 30 trading days.

title: First Brands to sell unit making Harley parts for $50 million
summary: First Brands is planning to sell a unit that manufactures parts for Harley-Davidson for $50 million. This transaction was reported by Steven Church of Bloomberg. The article provides details regarding this sale within the Manufacturing & Logistics sector.

title: DRVN Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
summary: Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between May 9, 2023, and February 24, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Driven Brands made false and misleading statements regarding its financial condition and internal controls, including overstated revenue and cash, and understated operating expenses due to an unreconciled cash balance. Investors who wish to serve as lead plaintiff must move the Court no later than May 8, 2026.

title: Video: Huntington Bank’s ‘3 Things We Learned this Week’
summary: Huntington Bank's Director of Equity Research, Randy Hare, provides an update on market reactions to the Middle East conflict. He delves into the energy markets, specifically oil and natural gas prices, and explains the factors contributing to rising yields. This video is part of Huntington Bank's regular "The Three Things We Learned This Week" series.

title: 3 Reasons to Sell DOLE and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: This article recommends selling Dole (DOLE) despite its recent stock performance, citing three main reasons: disappointing long-term revenue growth, low gross margins indicating weak structural profitability, and weak operating margins. The author suggests that while the current valuation of 11.2x forward P/E is reasonable, there isn't a significant opportunity, and better investment alternatives exist, pointing to high-quality stocks identified by their AI platform.

title: FBI detonates explosives in Bucks County connected to terror suspects
summary: The FBI and Middletown Police safely detonated explosive materials found at a storage facility in Bucks County. The explosives were connected to two Bucks County teens, Emir Balat and Ibrahim Kayumi, who are suspects in an "ISIS-inspired" terrorism plot outside the New York City Mayor's home. The teens allegedly admitted to being inspired by ISIS and attempting to detonate homemade explosive devices during a rally.

title: Nature's Sunshine: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
summary: Nature's Sunshine Products Inc. (NATR) reported a net income of $4.1 million, or 23 cents per share, for its fourth quarter. After adjusting for non-recurring costs, earnings were 30 cents per share, with revenue reaching $123.8 million. For the full year, the company posted a profit of $19.5 million and revenue of $480.1 million, and it anticipates full-year revenue for the upcoming period to be between $500 million and $515 million.

title: Denali ‘Moving In A Positive Direction’ With FDA Toward Hunter Drug Action Date
summary: Denali Therapeutics Inc. is reportedly progressing positively with the FDA regarding an action date for their Hunter drug. The article, published on March 10, 2026, details this development within the pharmaceutical industry. This news is relevant for those following rare diseases and the companies involved in their treatment.

title: 3M’s Brite Launch Puts Design And Valuation In Investor Focus
summary: 3M has launched "Brite by Scotch-Brite," a new line of cleaning tools emphasizing design and visual appeal to refresh its presence in the home cleaning category. This move highlights management's focus on product development and brand refresh in consumer markets, aiming to attract younger and design-conscious households. While 3M's shares are currently trading below analyst targets and estimated fair value, investors should monitor the impact of this new line on revenue and margins, and keep an eye on disciplined capital allocation given existing debt and dividend coverage concerns.

title: Morningstar, Intercontinental Exchange, and Fiserv Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of Morningstar (MORN), Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), and Fiserv (FISV) experienced a downturn due to broad market caution driven by concerns over the Asset Management sector. Lingering fears of bad loans and redemptions within the private credit sector, particularly related to Business Development Companies (BDCs), led to negative sentiment among investors. Despite the drop, market overreactions can create opportunities for high-quality stocks.

title: Retail Favorite nLIGHT Gains 4.5%: A Wartime Stock With a Laser Focus
summary: nLIGHT (LASR) stock surged 4.5% driven by its demonstration of 70kW-class laser weapon systems at the Pacific Operational Science and Technology (POST) Conference. The company's focus on counter-drone and counter-missile missions aligns with increasing military demand for directed energy defense, as reflected in its Q4 2025 revenue growth of 71.3% year-over-year, largely due to a near-doubling in Aerospace and Defense revenue. Despite not yet being profitable, analyst ratings are largely positive, with targets ranging from $62.50 to $95, indicating confidence in future government contracts and adoption of its laser technology.

title: Clorox Lines Up $2.25 Billion Credit Facilities to Support GOJO Acquisition
summary: Clorox has secured $2.25 billion in unsecured credit facilities to finance its acquisition of GOJO and enhance liquidity. The financing includes a $1.0 billion 364-day revolving credit facility for general corporate purposes and a $1.25 billion delayed draw term loan specifically for the GOJO purchase, related fees, and debt repayment. These agreements, led by JPMorgan Chase, Citibank, and Wells Fargo, provide Clorox with significant financial flexibility for the transaction.

title: Prudential Financial Board Of Directors Appoints CEO Andrew Sullivan As Chairman
summary: Prudential Financial's Board of Directors has appointed CEO Andrew Sullivan as its new Chairman. The announcement, shared via Reuters, is a brief update on the company's executive leadership.

title: The Hershey Company’s “Take the Taste With You” platform pushes one brand world and drives measurable results across travel retail
summary: The Hershey Company's "Take the Taste With You" platform is showing measurable success in travel retail by unifying its brands and engaging travelers through immersive displays and digital touchpoints. This strategy, unveiled at the 2025 TFWA World Exhibition & Conference, aims to connect with younger shoppers and make confectionery a key part of the travel experience, with successful early activations in major airports worldwide. The platform emphasizes consistent global expression with locally relevant executions, focusing on indulgence, gifting, and personalization.

title: NetApp, QuinStreet, and Xerox Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of NetApp, QuinStreet, and Xerox experienced declines in the afternoon session due to heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which led to volatile crude oil prices and a risk-off sentiment in the market. The article highlights how market overreactions to such news can present buying opportunities for high-quality stocks. QuinStreet, in particular, has seen significant volatility, including a recent drop due to unexpected global tariff announcements.

title: MSCI (MSCI): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: This article analyzes MSCI (MSCI) post-Q4 earnings, concluding that despite its recent trading around $565 since September 2025, it does not present a compelling buying opportunity. The report highlights MSCI's negative average return on equity of -139% over the last five years, indicating a lack of competitive moat and poor business quality. The author suggests that the stock's current forward P/E of 29.3x prices in too much good news, recommending investors look for better opportunities elsewhere.

title: Leonardo DRS appoints Reuben Jeffery III to board of directors
summary: Leonardo DRS, Inc. has announced the appointment of Reuben Jeffery III to its board of directors, effective April 1, 2026. This appointment comes as the defense technology company's stock has seen a significant surge, and Jeffery brings extensive experience from both government and finance, including roles at Rockefeller & Co. and Goldman Sachs. The company also recently reported strong financial results for Q4 2025 and had its price target raised by Morgan Stanley.

title: After 25 years at Prudential, Charles Lowrey hands chairman role to CEO Sullivan
summary: Prudential Financial has appointed CEO Andrew Sullivan as the new Chairman of the Board, effective March 10, 2026. Sullivan succeeds Charles Lowrey, who resigned as Executive Chairman and director on the same date and will retire from Prudential at the end of the second quarter after 25 years of service. Lowrey is credited with leading the company through a period of growth investments and organizational changes.

title: Oracle Posts Strong Cloud Revenue Growth Following AI Bookings (ORCL)
summary: Oracle Corp. reported cloud revenue exceeding expectations and forecast robust sales for the upcoming fiscal year, signaling successful AI bookings. Its infrastructure business saw an 84% increase in revenue, reaching $4.9 billion for the quarter ended Feb. 28, surpassing analyst predictions. This growth confirms the impact of Oracle's substantial investments in artificial intelligence.

title: WV American Water bills up $6–$7; special reduced-rate customers get 20% cut
summary: The West Virginia Public Service Commission has approved new rates for West Virginia American Water, leading to an annualized revenue increase of $20.5 million to support over $239 million in infrastructure investments. Residential water bills will increase by approximately $6 and wastewater bills by $7 per month for customers using 3,000 gallons, while customers on the Special Reduced Rate Residential Service (SRRRS) tariff will receive an additional 20% discount. These changes are effective March 1, 2026, and aim to balance essential system improvements with customer affordability.

title: VAALCO Energy Inc expected to post earnings of 2 cents a share - Earnings Preview
summary: VAALCO Energy Inc (EGY) is expected to announce earnings of 2 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv earnings preview. The article is very short, indicating it is a brief announcement of financial expectations.

title: Boeing Co Stock (BA) Closed Down by 3.26% on Mar 10: What Signal Does It Send?
summary: Boeing Co (BA) stock closed down by 3.26% on March 10, 2026, following the announcement of newly identified wiring flaws in its 737 MAX jets, which will cause near-term delivery delays. Despite this setback, the company stated that the issue does not compromise safety and is not expected to impact year-end delivery targets. Analysts generally agree that this is a short-term challenge, but the incident highlights market sensitivity to Boeing's production quality amid regulatory scrutiny.

title: FIS: Sharpened focus, AI-driven innovation, and strong financial guidance set the stage for 2026 growth
summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) is poised for accelerated growth in 2026, driven by operational excellence, strategic acquisitions, and a focus on financial services. The company is leveraging AI adoption, digital innovation, and cross-sell opportunities, with strong financial guidance and cash flow targets extending through 2028. This outlook is based on a recent transcript from the Wolfe FinTech Forum.

title: Viatris (VTRS): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Despite a recent impressive run where Viatris (VTRS) shares outperformed the S&P 500, analysts are cautious about the stock. Concerns stem from disappointing long-term revenue growth, a decline in earnings per share, and negative returns on invested capital. The article suggests avoiding Viatris due to shaky fundamentals, despite its optically cheap valuation, and recommends seeking better investment opportunities.

title: Huntington to Present Strategic 2026 Plan, Provides FY26 guidance and synergy targets
summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) will present its Strategic 2026 Plan at the RBC Global Financial Institutions Conference, providing updated FY26 guidance and synergy targets. The bank maintains its FY26 guidance, projects significant cost and revenue synergies from recent acquisitions, and aims for $1.90-$1.93 EPS and 18-19% ROTCE by 2027.

title: EQT Commences Tender Offer Up to $1.15B, Plans Redemption of $344.9M 2027 Notes
summary: EQT has launched a cash tender offer to repurchase up to $1.15 billion of specified senior notes and plans to redeem all outstanding 6.500% notes due 2027, totaling $344.9 million. The tender offer includes caps for different note series, an early tender premium, and an anticipated early settlement date of March 26, 2026. This financial move aims to reduce the company's principal debt, to be financed by cash on hand and, if necessary, revolver borrowings.

title: Amcor Issues $1.5 Billion Guaranteed Notes Due 2029 and 2036 to Refinance 2026 Debt
summary: Amcor (AMCR) successfully completed a $1.5 billion offering of guaranteed senior notes through its subsidiary, Amcor Flexibles North America. The offering is split into $750 million 4.250% notes due 2029 and $750 million 5.125% notes due 2036. The net proceeds will primarily be used to refinance 2026 maturities and reduce short-term debt, thereby extending Amcor’s debt maturities and enhancing its liquidity.

title: Brosius Mark, SVP, sells Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) stock for $1.8m
summary: Brosius Mark, SVP & Chief Manufacturing and Supply Chain at Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG), sold shares totaling $1,815,061 in multiple transactions between March 3 and March 5, 2026. Following these sales, Brosius directly holds 2,906 shares. The transactions were conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, and came amidst strong Q4 2025 financial results for Intuitive Surgical and positive analyst sentiment regarding its market expansion and product offerings.

title: Diamondback Energy Executives Sell Shares
summary: Several top executives at Diamondback Energy (FANG) recently sold a significant number of shares in the company. CAO Teresa L. Dick, CEO Matthew Kaes Van'T Hof, Executive Chairman Travis D. Stice, and Exec. VP & COO Wesson Daniel N all executed sales totaling millions of dollars in early March 2026. After these transactions, each executive still retains a substantial direct or indirect ownership in the company.

title: Diamondback stock sale: 11M shares offered, company gets no proceeds
summary: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ: FANG) announced a secondary offering of 11,000,000 shares of its common stock by SGF FANG Holdings, LP. Diamondback will not receive any proceeds from this sale. Evercore ISI, Citigroup, and J.P. Morgan are managing the offering, which also includes a 30-day option for underwriters to purchase an additional 1,650,000 shares to cover over-allotments.

title: Diamondback Energy Announces Launch of Secondary Common Stock Offering
summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. has announced the launch of a secondary underwritten public offering of 11,000,000 shares of its common stock by SGF FANG Holdings, LP. Diamondback will not receive any proceeds from this sale. The Selling Stockholder has also granted the underwriters an option to purchase an additional 1,650,000 shares to cover over-allotments.

title: U.S. Indexes Finished Mixed Tuesday As BridgeBio Pharma Led, Centene Lagged
summary: U.S. stock indexes closed mixed on Tuesday, with some indexes showing slight declines. BridgeBio Pharma led the market, while Centene lagged behind. The article also mentions several stock symbols relevant to the day's trading.

title: Brazil's Petrobras to auction 20 million liters of diesel amid shortage reports, sources say
summary: Brazil's state-run oil company Petrobras plans to auction 20 million liters of diesel in Rio Grande do Sul state due to reported shortages, aiming to stabilize the market. This move comes as domestic diesel prices have risen, partly due to global oil price fluctuations and Petrobras's previous reluctance to sell at a significant discount. The auction is intended to prevent distributors from profiting by storing cheaper fuel and to partially bridge the gap with international market prices.

title: Biogen to Participate in the Stifel 2026 Virtual CNS Forum
summary: Biogen announced that Diana Gallagher, M.D., and Stephanie Fradette, PharmD, will participate in a fireside chat at the Stifel 2026 Virtual CNS Forum on March 18, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. ET. The event will be webcast live on Biogen’s investor website, with an archived version available for 30 days. Biogen, a biotechnology company founded in 1978, focuses on developing innovative medicines.

title: Enbridge paid police to protect one pipeline. Now it wants to do it again in Wisconsin.
summary: Enbridge has secured an uncapped funding agreement with two Wisconsin counties to pay local law enforcement for policing potential protests against its Line 5 reroute. This agreement, mirroring similar arrangements from previous pipeline projects, allows sheriffs to bill the company for riot gear, training, and patrol expenses. Critics, including Indigenous community members, argue it turns public service into private security and raises concerns about disproportionate policing and transparency, particularly given the secretive nature of the reimbursement clause.

title: Equinix, Inc. Appoints Olivier Leonetti as Chief Financial Officer, Effective March 16, 2026
summary: Equinix, Inc. has announced the appointment of Olivier Leonetti as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective March 16, 2026. Leonetti brings over 30 years of financial leadership experience from various publicly traded companies, including Eaton, Johnson Controls, Zebra Technologies, and Western Digital. He will succeed Keith Taylor, who is retiring after 27 years with Equinix and will serve as an advisor during the transition.

title: After Cyberstalking Settlement, eBay Quietly Rewrites Board Oversight Rules
summary: One day after settling a cyberstalking lawsuit, eBay quietly updated the charters for its major board committees: Audit, Risk, Technology, Compensation and Human Capital, and Corporate Governance and Nominating. This move raises questions about whether these changes represent genuine cultural reform after the 2019 scandal or merely minimum compliance measures to move past the crisis. The article details the specific updates to each committee's responsibilities, highlighting a shift towards more defined risk oversight, but also questions the timing of these changes and the retention of some legacy leadership connected to the scandal.

title: The charts warn that airline stocks face more worries than just rising oil prices
summary: Airline stocks are facing more concerns than just rising oil prices, as indicated by the U.S. Global Jets exchange-traded fund (JETS) falling below key chart levels. This break suggests that the rally from last year's low might be over. The selloff, which started in early February, intensified last week despite a pullback in crude-oil futures.

title: 3 Unpopular Stocks That Fall Short
summary: This article identifies three unpopular stocks—Dine Brands (DIN), DaVita (DVA), and FTI Consulting (FCN)—that Wall Street analysts have issued downbeat forecasts for, suggesting problems with their business models or financial performance. For each company, it highlights specific reasons for caution, such as declining sales, efficiency issues, high debt, or muted growth. The author suggests that despite market skepticism, these concerns are well-placed, and better investment opportunities exist.

title: Leidos to participate in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Leidos announced its CFO, Chris Cage, will participate in a "fireside chat" at J.P. Morgan's 2026 Industrials Conference on March 17, 2026, at 1:40 p.m. ET. A live audio webcast and a replay will be available on the Leidos Investor Relations website. Leidos is a technology and industry leader with approximately 47,000 employees and reported revenues of around $17.2 billion for the fiscal year ended January 2, 2026.

title: Hear Leidos CFO questioned at J.P. Morgan industrials event
summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) announced that its CFO, Chris Cage, will participate in a Q&A "fireside chat" at the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on March 17, 2026, at 1:40 p.m. ET. A live audio webcast and a 30-day replay will be available on the company's investor relations website. This engagement follows strong fiscal year 2025 results and several strategic initiatives, including major defense contracts and a proposed acquisition.

title: Hilton Announces Hilton AI Planner
summary: Hilton has introduced the Hilton AI Planner, a new generative AI-powered digital concierge available on hilton.com. This tool uses conversational intelligence to assist travelers in planning their stays by providing real-time responses and curated recommendations, aiming to make travel planning more intuitive and personalized. The Hilton AI Planner will initially launch to a small group of users and will expand over time as Hilton learns from user feedback and behavior.

title: Paycom Releases Automated Career and Succession Planning Tool
summary: Paycom Software, Inc. has launched a new automated tool called Career and Succession Planning. This tool integrates with existing employee data to help organizations identify successors, assess bench strength, and manage talent development. It features a visual dashboard, analytics, 9-box talent mapping, and automated match scoring to streamline talent management processes.

title: Leonardo DRS (NASDAQ: DRS) adds Reuben Jeffery III, extends proxy director
summary: Leonardo DRS has announced changes to its Board of Directors, tied to its proxy agreement and US government security requirements. David W. Carey will retire on March 31, 2026, and Reuben Jeffery III has been appointed as a Class C proxy holder director for a term from April 1, 2026, to March 31, 2029. Additionally, Dr. Louis Brothers' term as a proxy holder director has been extended through March 31, 2029, maintaining the board's structure.

title: Leonardo DRS Announces Appointment of Reuben Jeffery III to Board of Directors
summary: Leonardo DRS, Inc. announced the appointment of Reuben Jeffery III to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. Jeffery brings extensive experience in public policy, global finance, and corporate governance from his past roles as CEO of Rockefeller & Co. and various senior positions in the U.S. government. He will succeed David W. Carey, who is retiring from the Board.

title: Demystifying Lam Research: Insights From 29 Analyst Reviews
summary: This article analyzes 29 recent analyst reviews for Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX), revealing a varied sentiment but an overall bullish trend. Analysts have set an average 12-month price target of $258.97, an increase of 23.61% from the previous average. The company shows strong financial performance with high market capitalization, significant revenue growth, and superior net margin, ROE, ROA, and debt management compared to industry averages.

title: Stanley Black & Decker to Present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Stanley Black & Decker's EVP, CFO & Chief Administrative Officer, Pat Hallinan, will present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 12:20 PM ET. Investors and the public can access a live webcast of the presentation and a 30-day replay on the company's investor relations website. Stanley Black & Decker, founded in 1843, is a global leader in tools and outdoor products with well-known brands like DEWALT, CRAFTSMAN, and STANLEY.

title: PYPL's Generic Risk Warnings Allegedly Failed Investors: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating whether PayPal Holdings, Inc.'s risk disclosures were adequate between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. A class action lawsuit alleges that while PayPal presented optimistic financial targets, it failed to disclose known internal problems that undermined these projections. The complaint challenges PayPal's disclosures under securities law, arguing that generic risk warnings are insufficient when specific operational issues are known to management.

title: APO Investor Alert: APOLLO GLOBAL MANAGEMENT, INC. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Concealed Epstein Ties: Levi & Korsinsky
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO). The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global concealed ties to Jeffrey Epstein, leading to significant stock price drops as these revelations emerged. Investors who purchased APO shares between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, and suffered losses may be eligible to lead a class action, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 1, 2026.

title: Nio ties CEO pay to long-term strategy with 2026 share plan
summary: Nio has implemented a 2026 share incentive plan, approved by its board, to align executive compensation with long-term company performance and attract talent. CEO William Li will receive 248 million restricted share units, vesting in ten tranches tied to stringent market capitalization and net profit targets. The plan also extends to other eligible employees, directors, and consultants to motivate the team and provide equity interest opportunities.

title: Trimble Roadworks Integrates Real-Time Asphalt Compaction Quality Control
summary: Trimble has integrated GSSI's PaveScan RS ground penetrating radar sensor into its Roadworks paving control platform for asphalt compactors. This integration provides real-time asphalt compaction metrics on every pass, allowing contractors to monitor quality and make adjustments during the paving process rather than relying on core samples taken after completion. This solution aims to improve safety, profitability, and sustainability by reducing rework, ensuring longer-lasting roads, and eliminating the need for destructive testing.

title: Waste management EVP Reed sells $18,394 in stock
summary: David L. Reed, EVP and CFO of Waste Management Inc (NYSE:WM), sold 75 shares of common stock for $18,394 and also disposed of 121 shares related to a restricted share award for $29,803. The stock is considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis, despite a consistent dividend history, and the sales follow a recent earnings miss for the company.

title: Texas Instruments unveils two new microcontroller units to support Edge AI applications
summary: Texas Instruments (TI) has introduced two new microcontroller units, MSPM0G5187 and AM13Ex, designed for Edge AI applications. These MCUs integrate TI's TinyEngine Neural Processing Unit (NPU), which significantly reduces latency by up to 90 times and energy consumption by over 120 times per inference compared to traditional methods. This initiative aims to make Edge AI more accessible and energy-efficient across TI's microcontroller portfolio.

title: Anthem To Penalize California Hospitals For Out-Of-Network Doctors
summary: Anthem Blue Cross plans to implement a 10% payment penalty on in-network California hospitals that bill for care provided by out-of-network doctors, effective June 1. This policy, aimed at preventing surprise medical bills for self-insured employer health plans, has already been applied in several other states. Health care providers, however, are pushing back against such penalties, with some states considering legislation to address the issue.

title: Runway Growth Finance Corp expected to post earnings of 35 cents a share - Earnings Preview
summary: Runway Growth Finance Corp (RWAY) is anticipated to report earnings of 35 cents per share. This information comes from a Reuters earnings preview. The article provides a brief note about the upcoming financial announcement.

title: UBS Lowers Price Target for Sunrun (RUN) While Maintaining Buy R
summary: UBS has reconfirmed its Buy rating for Sunrun (RUN) but has lowered its price target from $26.00 to $23.00 following an evaluation by analyst Jon Windham. This adjustment is part of a broader trend of mixed analyst ratings for Sunrun, with some firms downgrading or lowering targets while others maintain or raise them. Despite the revised target, the average analyst price target suggests a significant upside potential for Sunrun from its current trading price.

title: Transaction in Own Shares
summary: Prudential plc announced the purchase of 375,388 of its ordinary shares from JP Morgan Securities plc on March 9, 2026, at an average price of £10.5015 per share. The company intends to cancel these repurchased shares, which will result in 2,532,875,754 shares remaining in issue. This transaction was conducted under the authority granted by shareholders at the 2025 Annual General Meeting.

title: ROLR: Improved profitability and strategic U.S. market expansion set the stage for 2026 growth
summary: ROLR (High Roller Technologies, Inc.) experienced improved profitability and operational efficiency in 2025, driven by a strategic focus on U.S. prediction markets and iGaming expansion. Despite lower revenues from market exits, new capital and leadership are expected to position the company for significant growth in 2026. This information is based on an SEC 8-K report from March 10, 2026.

title: High Roller bets on $1T U.S. prediction markets in Crypto.com deal
summary: High Roller Technologies (NYSE: ROLR) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, alongside a significant strategic move to expand into regulated U.S. prediction markets through a binding letter of intent with Crypto.com | Derivatives North America. Despite an 11.9% decline in full-year net revenues to $20.5 million, the company achieved net income from continuing operations of $0.69 million and raised $26 million in January 2026 to fuel growth initiatives. The company emphasized its transformation towards operational efficiency and new market entry, positioning itself for future growth in iGaming and the potentially trillion-dollar U.S. prediction market.

title: Higher oil prices will not spur more US production, oilfield services company Patterson-UTI says
summary: Higher oil prices resulting from geopolitical events will not immediately increase U.S. oil production, according to Andy Hendricks, CEO of Patterson-UTI. He stated that the lack of market predictability and the long lead times for bringing new wells online prevent a quick response to price surges. U.S. oil production is already near record levels, and future output will depend on the stability of the situation in Iran and trade through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: The Marzetti Company, Hain Celestial, and Vital Farms Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know

Hain Celestial, in particular, has seen significant volatility, exacerbated by recent geopolitical tensions impacting oil prices and broader market concerns.

title: JPMorgan Raises Itau Unibanco Price Target Amid New Financial Model

The report highlights Itau Unibanco's resilient revenue figures, controlled operational costs, and commitment to shareholder returns through substantial interest payments on capital.

title: Groupon: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
summary: Groupon Inc. reported a Q4 net income of $7.3 million, or 17 cents per share, meeting Wall Street expectations. However, their revenue of $132.7 million for the period missed forecasts. For the entire year, the company posted a net loss of $83.5 million on revenue of $498.4 million.

title: Groupon (NASDAQ: GRPN) returns to Q4 profit and posts 2025 cash flow

The company achieved $498.4 million in full-year revenue and $1.7 billion in gross billings, along with positive operating cash flow of $64.5 million and free cash flow of $49.9 million. In Q4 2025, Groupon posted a net income of $8.1 million, a significant turnaround from a loss in the prior year, and saw its active customers grow to 16.2 million.

title: Lifeway Foods® to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on March 17, 2026

(FBRT), naming former President and current CEO Michael Comparato as a defendant. This event highlights how geopolitical shifts can trigger market volatility, presenting potential buying opportunities for high-quality stocks.

title: Does KBR's 10-year Indorama catalyst deal strengthen ammonia business?

The deal positions KBR as a long-term supplier of catalysts, indicating a move to secure recurring revenue and reinforce its market presence in ammonia technology.
